Who Walk In The Door

-- 1 of 204 --

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 2 of 204 --

100% of prospects who walk in
the door make to your business?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 3 of 204 --

or even 3x as much per lead?

www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 6 of 204 --

EFT...do you think they would be a
threat?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

● Trainer = $20/hr
● Cost Per Meeting = $10
● Rev Per Meeting = $100 (minimum)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 133 of 204 --

Money Math:
● 30min Meeting
● Trainer = $20/hr
● Cost Per Meeting = $10
● Rev Per Meeting = $100
● $100 - $10 / $100 = 90% Margin
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 168 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 169 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
● A few grams of protein makes no difference if
they never consume it
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 170 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
● A few grams of protein makes no difference if they
never consume it
● Harder to price compare (protein is a
commoditized game)
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 171 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
● A few grams of protein makes no difference if they
never consume it
● Harder to price compare (protein is a commoditized
game)
● Meal replacements SAVE you money vs COST
you money
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 172 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
● A few grams of protein makes no difference if they
never consume it
● Harder to price compare (protein is a commoditized
game)
● Meal replacements SAVE you money vs COST you
money
● Margin that is scalable
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 173 of 204 --

Why a meal replacement not a pure protein?
● They’ll actually drink it because it tastes great
● A few grams of protein makes no difference if they
never consume it
● Harder to price compare (protein is a commoditized
game)
● Meal replacements SAVE you money vs COST you
money
● Margin that is scalable

-- 191 of 204 --

the original supplement sale)
Which meal do you typically struggle the most
with?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 192 of 204 --

Most will say breakfast (that they don’t eat it) or
lunch out.
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com

-- 193 of 204 --

Then you will ask:
You struggle with lunch, would you like some
help with that?
www.getwsodo.com	www.getwsodo.com
